yettel_rs.name: Yettel Serbia
yettel_rs.notes: Best tourist eSIM operator in Serbia. Unlimited eSIM packages with confirmed WB roaming quotas. Marketing GB structure mixes unrestricted and app/social — always separate.

a1_rs.name: A1 Serbia
a1_rs.notes: Strong domestic data. WB roaming via RLAH/fair-use — no specific GB quota published. Best Serbia-only heavy use or long stays.

mts_rs.name: mts Serbia
mts_rs.notes: Strongest WB roaming clarity. Zona 0 = explicit WB GB included in every add-on. Cheapest WB roaming in Serbia. Tourist UX weakest.

vodafone_de.name: Vodafone Germany
vodafone_de.notes: Most tourist-friendly German operator. Online eSIM with remote identity verification — no store visit required. Hotel address accepted. CallYa plans with full EU roaming.

telekom_de.name: Telekom Germany
telekom_de.notes: Germany's best network (T-Mobile globally). Requires a German address — not suitable for most tourists. Best for expats or long-term visitors.

o2_de.name: O2 Germany
o2_de.notes: Good value German prepaid. Online eSIM with identity verification. No permanent address required. Continues at reduced speed after data cap.

vodafone_al.name: Vodafone Albania
vodafone_al.notes: Best airport experience. Physical SIM only — remote purchase unreliable. Airport TIA purchase recommended.

one_al.name: One Albania
one_al.notes: Has eSIM on paper. In practice, activation often requires airport or store visit. Good urban coverage.

one_me.name: One Montenegro
one_me.notes: Strongest WB tourist eSIM in Montenegro. Explicit WB quotas per plan. Data-only tourist tiers. One Pripejd has local number/calls.

telekom_me.name: Telekom Montenegro
telekom_me.notes: Strongest roaming safety controls (SMS commands to prevent surprise bills). Shared home quota used in WB. All incoming WB calls free. Best for calls/SMS + predictable roaming.

mtel_me.name: m:tel Montenegro
mtel_me.notes: Best raw GB-per-euro. WB via shared home quota fair-use for tourist tiers. Dedicated WB add-ons with explicit GB. First top-up bonus activates extra WB.

bhtelecom_ba.name: BH Telecom
bhtelecom_ba.notes: Strong airport tourist offer. eSIM available online. English tourist page at bhtelecom.ba/en/

mtel_ba.name: m:tel Bosnia
mtel_ba.notes: Physical SIM only. No eSIM currently. Good coverage but less tourist-friendly.

telekom_mk.name: Telekom N. Macedonia
telekom_mk.notes: eSIM available. Tourist prepaid plans. Online purchase works. Passport required.

a1_mk.name: A1 N. Macedonia
a1_mk.notes: eSIM available. Good English support. Online purchase available.

airalo.name: Airalo
airalo.notes: Largest travel eSIM marketplace. Instant setup, no KYC, no local phone number. Data-only. More expensive per GB than local prepaid plans. Prices in USD — EUR conversion approximate.

nomad.name: Nomad
nomad.notes: Travel eSIM provider. Instant setup, no registration. Data-only — no local phone number. Prices are estimates — verify at getnomad.app before purchasing.

yesim.name: Yesim
yesim.notes: Travel eSIM with virtual phone number option. Instant setup.

saily.name: Saily
saily.notes: Travel eSIM. Competitive pricing. Instant setup, no KYC.

mobimatter.name: MobiMatter
mobimatter.notes: Travel eSIM marketplace. Often cheapest per GB. No local number.

holafly.name: Holafly
holafly.notes: Travel eSIM. Unlimited data plans. Popular for European travel. No local number.

orange_flex_pl.name: Orange Flex Poland
orange_flex_pl.notes: Orange Flex Poland — EU nomad strategy. 35 PLN/month (≈€8.24). 75 GB domestic + 12.03 GB EU roaming. App-only, foreign passport accepted, no Polish address required. Works across all EU/EEA countries via roaming.

hot_at.name: HoT Austria
hot_at.notes: HoT is the Hutchison brand in Austria. Foreign passports accepted, no Austrian address required. Online eSIM, activate before arrival. EU roaming included.

lyca_de.name: Lyca Mobile Germany
lyca_de.notes: MVNO. International focus. Tourist accessibility unverified.

free_mobile_fr.name: Free Mobile
free_mobile_fr.notes: Exceptional value (35 GB EU roaming). French address requirement unverified for tourists. Needs review.

orange_fr.name: Orange France
orange_fr.notes: Major operator. Prepaid available. Tourist remote activation unverified.

bouygues_fr.name: Bouygues Telecom
bouygues_fr.notes: Major operator. Prepaid available. Tourist accessibility unverified.

sfr_fr.name: SFR
sfr_fr.notes: Major operator. Prepaid available. Tourist accessibility unverified.

digi_es.name: DIGI Spain
digi_es.notes: Very competitive pricing. Romanian-owned. Tourist activation details unverified.

vodafone_es.name: Vodafone Spain
vodafone_es.notes: Major operator. Prepaid available. Tourist details unverified.

orange_es.name: Orange Spain
orange_es.notes: Major operator. Prepaid available. Tourist details unverified.

movistar_es.name: Movistar Spain
movistar_es.notes: Telefonica brand. Prepaid available. Tourist details unverified.

iliad_it.name: Iliad Italy
iliad_it.notes: Very competitive. Foreign passport accepted. Codice Fiscale requirement uncertain. Store activation confirmed.

tim_it.name: TIM
tim_it.notes: Main Italian operator. Prepaid available. Tourist activation unverified.

vodafone_it.name: Vodafone Italy
vodafone_it.notes: Major operator. Prepaid available. Tourist activation unverified.

windtre_it.name: WINDTRE
windtre_it.notes: Italian operator. Prepaid available. Tourist activation unverified.

digi_ro.name: DIGI Romania
digi_ro.notes: Very competitive pricing. Popular for data-heavy use. Tourist details unverified.

orange_ro.name: Orange Romania
orange_ro.notes: Major operator. Prepaid available. Tourist details unverified.

vodafone_ro.name: Vodafone Romania
vodafone_ro.notes: Major operator. Prepaid available. Tourist details unverified.

meo_pt.name: MEO

vodafone_pt.name: Vodafone Portugal
vodafone_pt.notes: Major operator. Prepaid available. Tourist details unverified.

nos_pt.name: NOS
nos_pt.notes: Major operator. Prepaid available. Tourist details unverified.

spusu_at.name: spusu
spusu_at.notes: Austrian MVNO. Competitive pricing. Tourist activation details unverified.

a1_at.name: A1 Austria
a1_at.notes: Major Austrian operator. eSIM available. Tourist details unverified.

lebara_nl.name: Lebara Netherlands
lebara_nl.notes: International MVNO. Tourist-friendly. eSIM available. Good EU roaming.

kpn_nl.name: KPN Prepaid
kpn_nl.notes: Main Dutch operator. Prepaid available. eSIM supported. Tourist details unverified.

orange_be.name: Orange Belgium
orange_be.notes: Major Belgian operator. Prepaid available. Tourist accessibility unverified.

lyca_be.name: Lyca Mobile Belgium
lyca_be.notes: International MVNO. eSIM listed. Roaming caps unverified.

proximus_be.name: Proximus
proximus_be.notes: Main Belgian operator. Prepaid available. Tourist details unverified.

vodafone_cz.name: Vodafone Czech
vodafone_cz.notes: Modern operator. eSIM supported. Tourist activation generally straightforward.

o2_cz.name: O2 Czech
o2_cz.notes: Major operator. eSIM supported. Tourist details unverified.

tmobile_cz.name: T-Mobile Czech
tmobile_cz.notes: Major operator. eSIM supported. Tourist details unverified.

4ka_sk.name: 4ka
4ka_sk.notes: Slovak MVNO. Competitive pricing. Tourist details unverified.

orange_sk.name: Orange Slovakia
orange_sk.notes: Major Slovak operator. Tourist details unverified.

o2_sk.name: O2 Slovakia
o2_sk.notes: Major Slovak operator. Tourist details unverified.

a1_hr.name: A1 Croatia
a1_hr.notes: Major Croatian operator. eSIM available. Tourist details unverified.

hthr.name: Hrvatski Telekom
hthr.notes: T-Mobile affiliate. Prepaid available. Tourist details unverified.

a1_si.notes: Major Slovenian operator. Tourist details unverified.

telekom_si.name: Telekom Slovenije

vodafone_cu_gr.name: Vodafone CU
vodafone_cu_gr.notes: Greek Vodafone CU prepaid brand. Tourist details unverified.

cosmote_gr.name: Cosmote What's Up
cosmote_gr.notes: Main Greek operator prepaid brand. Tourist details unverified.

three_ie.name: Three Ireland
three_ie.notes: Major Irish operator. eSIM supported. Tourist-friendly. English-speaking market.

vodafone_ie.name: Vodafone Ireland
vodafone_ie.notes: Major operator. eSIM supported. Tourist details unverified.

a1_bg.name: A1 Bulgaria
a1_bg.notes: Major Bulgarian operator. Tourist details unverified.

telekom_hu.notes: T-Mobile affiliate. Prepaid available. Tourist details unverified.

telia_ee.name: Telia Estonia
telia_ee.notes: Estonian market leader. eSIM supported. Strong digital infrastructure.

elisa_ee.name: Elisa Estonia
elisa_ee.notes: Major Estonian operator. eSIM supported. Tourist-accessible.

lmt_lv.name: LMT
lmt_lv.notes: Latvian market leader. eSIM supported. Strong Baltic digital infrastructure.

tele2_lv.name: Tele2 Latvia
tele2_lv.notes: Baltic operator. eSIM supported. Tourist details unverified.

bite_lv.name: Bite Latvia

telenor_dk.name: Telenor Denmark
telenor_dk.notes: Major Danish operator. eSIM supported. Tourist details unverified.

comviq_se.name: Comviq
comviq_se.notes: Swedish Tele2 brand. Competitive prepaid. eSIM supported.

dna_fi.name: DNA Finland
dna_fi.notes: Finnish operator. eSIM supported. Competitive prepaid market.

post_lu.name: POST Luxembourg
post_lu.notes: Main Luxembourg operator. Tourist details unverified.

tango_lu.name: Tango
tango_lu.notes: Luxembourg operator (Proximus group). Tourist details unverified.

go_mt.name: GO Malta
go_mt.notes: Main Maltese operator. Tourist details unverified.

melita_mt.name: Melita
melita_mt.notes: Maltese cable/mobile operator. Tourist details unverified.

play_pl.name: Play Poland
play_pl.network: Play Poland 5G (now merged with T-Mobile PL)
play_pl.notes: Play merged with T-Mobile Poland. Prepaid available. eSIM exists. Tourist activation details and EU roaming GB cap unverified — needs manual check.

plus_pl.name: Plus Poland
plus_pl.notes: Plus Poland (Polkomtel) prepaid. eSIM available. EU roaming included. Tourist activation and exact EU roaming GB cap unverified.

tmobile_pl.name: T-Mobile Poland
tmobile_pl.notes: T-Mobile Poland (now includes Play network). Prepaid available. eSIM supported. EU roaming included but exact GB cap unverified for tourists.

globaltel_rs.name: Globaltel Serbia
globaltel_rs.notes: Digital-first MVNO/eSIM platform. Modular architecture (Global Travel / Explore / Nomad / Balkan UP). Best for digital nomads and multi-region travelers. Infrastructure confidence lower than MNO.
